final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: needs a "promotional poster" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Tumblr graphic design maximalism, Japanese ポスター typography culture, contemporary Korean beauty campaign layering; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include layered/stacked typography arrangement, must include overlapping elements where products/subjects partially obscure text
Subject: must include products or promotional items as focal subjects partially overlapping with text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a dynamic promotional energy — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include artistic typography treatment with decorative letterforms
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic typography, must include font stacking/layering, composition must be complex but not cluttered, products or subjects must partially block some text elements
Avoid: cluttered chaos, unreadable text due to over-layering
